source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A pressure cooker has the lid screwed on tight. A small opening with A= 5 $mm^2$ is covered with a petcock that can be lifted to let steam escape. How much mass should the petcock have to allow boiling at 120◦C with an outside atmosphere at 101.3 kPa?
